rules.description: CSS must use variables from :root (e.g., var(--white-1), var(--eerie-black-1)) instead of hardcoded color values like #fff, rgb(), or hsl(). The design system defines all colors as CSS custom properties in style.css.
JavaScript must be vanilla JS only. No framework imports (React, Vue, Angular, jQuery, etc.). Use document.querySelector and addEventListener for DOM manipulation.
Remove console.log statements before committing. Use proper error handling with try/catch instead.
Use semantic HTML elements (header, main, section, article, nav, footer). Maintain heading hierarchy (h1 > h2 > h3, no skipping). Every page must have exactly one h1.
All img elements must have descriptive alt text. Below-fold images must include loading='lazy'. External links with target='_blank' must include rel='noopener'.
When portfolio content changes (experience, skills, projects in index.html), the chatbot knowledge base at assets/js/chatbot-context.json must also be updated to stay in sync.
No API keys, secrets, or credentials should be committed to the repository. The chatbot uses a secure backend proxy for OpenAI API access.
